name: patternfly-java
description: Skills for developing PatternFly Java components

skills.name: pf-compare
skills.description: Compare a PatternFly component against its PatternFly Java implementation to identify variation coverage gaps and DOM/CSS differences. Use when asked to /pf-compare, compare PF component, check PFJ completeness, find missing PF variations, gap analysis, or generate a component comparison report.

skills.name: pf-align
skills.description: Align a PatternFly Java component with PatternFly by implementing action items from pf-compare reports. Use when asked to /pf-align, align component, implement missing variations, fix PFJ component, apply pf-compare recommendations, add missing PFJ variations, sync with PatternFly, bring component up to date, implement pf-compare action items, or implement changes from a comparison report.
